programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: Laverne, Shirley, Frank, and Edna travel to New York to visit Frank's mother and attend a street festival; they are joined there by Lenny and Squiggy (who hitchhiked).

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: Laverne, Shirley, Frank, Edna, Lenny, and Squiggy continue their visit to New York, and Frank wants to win a trip to Italy for his mother by winning the Greased Pole competition.

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: TV game show "Be Silly for Dollars" comes to Milwaukee. Len, Squig, and the girls are chosen as contestants. The boys are happy, winning a salami, but the girls perform zany stunts to win the grand prize from "The World of Luxury".

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: Laverne's new man Jake is exciting, but that excitement turns to danger when he forces her to help rob a store. Shaken up, she begs Shirley to help rid her of him. Jake won't have it, but can they get him to surrender to the police?

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: Shirley takes a night school Medical Assistance class. Laverne joins her too. Professor Wilner makes learning tough for Laverne so she walks out, as he says she's unteachable. Will Shirley help Laverne bone up and pass the class?

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: A bully that works with Lenny and Squiggy is always pushing them around. He gets them to set him up with Laverne, but he has only one thing on his mind. Will the guys step aside or stand up to him and save Laverne?

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: Shirley befriends a German Shepard at the kennel when its abusive owner claims he's a mad dog. Finding out all unadopted and unclaimed dogs are killed, she and Laverne have a sit-in. Can their efforts save him and all the other dogs?

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: Frank DeFazio loses some of his Christmas spirit when he has to cancel his yearly gathering for the homeless and poor. The girls and friends step in to help him keep the holiday meaningful for the less fortunate.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: It could be Mork's last night on Earth when an ancient Orkan elder who looks like a ten-year-old boy arrives with the news that Mork must return to Ork for forecycling because he has picked up too many Earthly ways.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: With Mindy depressed about not getting a scholarship, it's up to Mork to stir up some laughs, so he brings home a friend who claims to be the real Peter Pan, with the power to fly as just one of his magical talents.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: It's the biggest, funniest roller marathon ever when Mork takes to skates for the first time to race a cheating champion skater down a Rocky Mountain peak into Boulder to save the day care center at which he works from destruction.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: Spaceman Mork gets so cosmically carried away with pulling practical jokes that he surprises Mindy by assembling her jeep in their living room right over Mr. Bickley's apartment - with disastrous results.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: Mork turns the apartment he shares with Mindy into a hilarious hideaway for a young chimpanzee that he kidnaps from the Boulder zoo in the mistaken belief that the animal's mother has been abducted.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: Mork sends the face-lifting business into orbit when he hilariously rushes to a plastic surgeon to shoot the works after Mindy gives Mork the idea that everyone could use a little improverrent on Mork & Mindy.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: Sophomore Joanie Cunningham gets basic back-seat defense tips from Richie and Fonzie before her first "car date" with a senior boy, and then cramps her older brother's style when she and her date show up at his college "make-out" party.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: What begins as a humorous escapade with a motorcycle turns into a tragic vigil for the Cunninghams and their friends.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: Fonzie's latest romantic interest, a ballet teacher, is secretly yearning to turn professional and dance with the greats in New York. Fonzie, however, has trouble accepting that she may forgo their relationship to pursue her dreams of fame.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Amy works with Ty and Caleb's barrel-racing horse and ends up riding him in a high-stakes futurity race.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Soon after coming back to the ranch, Amy starts to question her place there and with Ty. Georgie becomes a fan of Amy's but then learns a dark secret.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Some horse training issues have Amy and Caleb at odds, and Ty must mediate. Following a shocking revelation, Georgie distances herself from Amy.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Amy keeps getting derailed as she tries to reunite with Georgie. Tim and Jack join forces for a charity event. Ty questions his career prospects.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: The Prince returns and declares his love for Amy, shaking up Amy and Ty's relationship. Lou and Peter take Katie to a specialist for evaluation.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Amy's forced to compete with a rival trainer. Georgie tries to reunite Amy and Ty. Lou regrets her decision to hire Jade to work at the ranch.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Amy deals with a client horse that appears to be an escape artist, and Ty enlists Scott's help in busting a dangerous poaching ring.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Back from the rodeo circuit, Tim begins to have doubts about his relationship with Casey. Amy and Georgie help a Hutterite family with their horses.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Georgie's school project unearths a surprising revelation about her past. Casey intends to buy a bulldogging horse, forcing a confession from Tim.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Jack and Amy help an old friend in Pike River when they learn a herd of wild horses is in danger. Peter lies to Lou, causing strain in their marriage.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: United in their attempt to save the wild horses, Amy and Ty grow closer. Lou and Peter call a truce while facing false child endangerment charges.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Amy learns Peter was offered a job in Calgary but didn't accept. Georgie is feeling overwhelmed but she is conflicted about accepting help with Phoenix.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Amy and Ty's plans for a road trip to Montana hit a snag, and Lou confronts Peter about his lies and choosing to further his career in Vancouver.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Tim starts a rodeo school and deals with a challenging student right out of the gate. Learning his mom is back in rehab, Ty blames his stepfather.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día dos
programme.desc: Después de una desastrosa noche de apertura, ambos equipos aprenden la importancia del servicio en un restaurante: servir mesas.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día tres
programme.desc: Frustrado después de otro mediocre servicio en la cena, el chef Ramsay comparte algunas de sus experiencias dirigiendo un exitoso restaurante mientras prepara la competencia de la tercera noche.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día cuatro
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay pone fin a la batalla de los sexos y "Hell's Kitchen" abre nuevos caminos cuando los equipos cocinan para un grupo especialmente exigente: los niños.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día cinco
programme.desc: El quinto día comienza con el chef Ramsay dando una lección a los concursantes restantes sobre el arte del sabor culinario.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día seis
programme.desc: Los seis chefs restantes preparan sus platos originales, y los dos equipos diseñan sus menús para la cena de la noche.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Dia siete
programme.desc: Los chefs deben trabajar como equipo por primera vez. El premio de este desafío es un viaje con el chef Ramsay al Red Rock Casino, Resort and Spa.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día ocho
programme.desc: Con solo cuatro chefs restantes, la competencia se vuelve feroz. ¿Quién de ellos tiene lo que se necesita para ser el jefe de cocina del nuevo restaurante de Gordon Ramsay?

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día nueve
programme.desc: Los concursantes prueban el plato estrella del chef Ramsay y se les dan veinte minutos para reproducirlo. Las tensiones aumentan entre los chefs en medio de acusaciones de trampa.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día diez - Parte 1
programme.desc: Luego de una visita sorpresa de familiares, los concursantes restantes deberán diseñar sus propios restaurantes y jerarquías para el servicio final.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día diez - Parte 2
programme.desc: Desde el menú hasta la decoración, los dos finalistas deben demostrar su talento al chef Ramsay, ya que cada uno está a cargo de sus propios restaurantes.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El tiránico Chef Gordon Ramsay regresa por tercer verano para enseñar y torturar a posibles Chefs. El ganador recibirá un trabajo de Chef en el resort Green Valley Ranch de Nevada.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los dos equipos se enfrentan en un desafío de preparación de alimentos que recompensa a los ganadores por la oportunidad de pasar tiempo con el Chef Ramsay fuera de la cocina.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay ordena a los concursantes restantes que preparen el desayuno para los miembros del servicio visitantes. El equipo ganador tendrá tiempo libre y los perdedores tendrán el rol de patrullar la cocina.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: En el cuarto día, los Chefs restantes compiten en una prueba de degustación con los ojos vendados. Los perdedores deben aceptar un castigo difícil mientras los ganadores cenan con el Chef Ramsay.

programme.desc: Chef Monique Barbeau creates eggplant falafel with tahini dressing. Pastry chef Jacques Torres prepares a baked chocolate soup with meringue.

programme.title: The French Chef
programme.desc: Julia visits charming Chef Deblieux in Paris where he demonstrates how to work with chocolate and produce sheets of it for decorations, figures, squares, letterings, and chocolate cigarettes.

programme.title: The French Chef
programme.desc: This French lasagne is a concoction of pasta, tomato sauce, saffron threads, dried orange peel, leftover meat and a rich and velvety sauce.

programme.title: Julia & Jacques Cooking at Home
programme.desc: “There’s nothing as good as a good piece of meat”, and as Julia is quick to point out, there is less and less really good (well marbled and aged) beef to be found.

programme.title: In Julia's Kitchen with Master Chefs
programme.desc: Rick Bayless, known for his skill in cooking Mexican food, creates a black bean tortilla casserole and refried beans.

programme.title: Baking With Julia
programme.desc: Charlotte Akoto prepares meringue cookies, cocoa nests with caramel mousse, and tropical napoleon.

programme.title: Julia & Jacques Cooking at Home
programme.desc: Julia and Jacques demonstrate recipes for sausage and pate that are right out of the French countryside.

programme.title: The French Chef
programme.desc: Julia Child prepares Lobster a l'Americaine, a great French lobster dish. Julia shows how to pick out a lobster, how to prepare live lobster, including how to saute and flambe lobster and how to make the sauce Américaine.

programme.title: Baking With Julia
programme.desc: Lauren Groveman, founder of Lauren Groveman's Kitchen, Inc., prepares bagels, matzos, and pumpernickel loaves.

programme.title: In Julia's Kitchen with Master Chefs
programme.desc: Alfred Portale creates duck soup with foie gras ravioli and black truffles.

programme.title: In Julia's Kitchen with Master Chefs
programme.desc: Carol Field prepares grissini (breadsticks) and rustic country bread.

programme.title: Baking With Julia
programme.desc: Johanna Killeen makes "baby cakes" -- miniatures made from a basic batter varied with flavorings.

programme.title: The French Chef
programme.desc: A French poached egg is not for breakfast. It makes its appearance later in the day; it goes into a souffle, it is served with Bearnaise Sauce and mushrooms in a buttery tartelette, or it comes shimmering to the table cloaked in aspic.

programme.title: The French Chef
programme.desc: None as brown, as crisp, or as fresh as those made at home.

programme.title: The French Chef

programme.title: The French Chef
programme.desc: Pate a Choux, a quick-change pastry -- Julia Child uses this versatile pastry for everything from appetizers and dumplings to fancy desserts.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: The Joes go Hollywood as technical advisers on a movie about their special-missions unit. But when the filmmakers attempt to use a captured Cobra stinger, Cobra Commander has another idea for the movie's ending.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Led by the Drednoks, gangs run wild in the streets to prevent the election of a candidate who wants to clean up the city. The gangs don't know that Cobra is funding his opponent, and the gang outbursts are calculated to ensure a landslide victory.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Cobra plans to throw the country into economic chaos! With a molecular regenerator at his fingertips, Cobra commander plans to disintegrate U.S. currency and replace it with Cobra coin. Flint, Ripcord, and Ace jump into action to help cancel these checks.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Cobra kidnaps people with paranormal powers for a battalion of "Special Recruits," hoping to use their incredible gifts against the Joes.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: When the Baroness acquires a legendary conch and uses its mind-controlling siren song on all the males among Joe and Cobra's ranks, it's up to Scarlett, Lady Jaye and Cover Girl to end her reign of terror.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Tokyo is the site of a world economic conference - and Cobra's latest target for chaos. When Cobra devises a plan to destroy the whole city with an earthquake, the Joes are sent in to stop them.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Part 1 of 2. When G.I. Joe captures a secret Cobra explosive, Cobra responds by kidnapping several Joe family members and brainwashing them into fighting a battle for its return. It's a strike force the Joes are afraid to fight or harm.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Part 2 of 2. The Joes are caught off-balance when their very families and personal lives are used against them. To defeat Cobra, retrieve the explosive, and rescue their loved ones, the Joes not only have to be tough, but creative too.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: While on a camping trip, Bazooka watches a monstrous creature rise from the water and devour what looks like a giant firefly. Unfortunately, none of the Joes believe him, until it's revealed that this "sea serpent" is a Cobra-built submarine!

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: After an air duel, Storm Shadow crashes into a lake in the north of Britain. He's rescued from his sinking plane by an apparition who guides him to the legendary sword Excalibur resting on the lake bottom. With the sword, Storm Shadow will be unstoppable!

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Part 1 of 2. Disillusioned by constant battle, Stealer is ready to resign from the Joe team. He gains new perspective when a Cobra weapon malfunctions and opens a rift between realities, throwing him and the Joes into a world where Cobra is in control.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Part 2 of 2. Trapped in the alternate Cobra - controlled world, the Joes find an unlikely ally in the Baroness. With her help, Stealer, Clutch and the others search for a way back to their own reality. But Cobra is closing in…

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Part 1 of 5. Cobra has developed the ultimate weapon… the M.A.S.S. Device, capable of beaming and transporting troops, weapon and resources anywhere in the world. When Cobra uses the device to steal a military satellite, G.I. Joe is called into action.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Part 2 of 5. Ready to fight fire with fire, the JOE team constructs a M.A.S.S. Device to counter Cobra. Meanwhile, Duke, still a captive of Cobra and Destro, fights for his life in the gladiator-style arena at Cobra Mountain.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Part 4 of 5. After Cobra Commander squanders his resources, both Cobra and G.I. Joe are desperate to get their hands on the final element needed to fuel the M.A.S.S. Device. It's Joe versus Cobra at themouth of an active volcano, winner take all!

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Part 5 of 5. Destro returns to Cobra Mountain with Scarlett as his prisoner. As he takes control of the operation from Cobra Commander, the stakes are raised for the Joe team to stop them once and for all with an all-out assault on Cobra Mountain!

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Part 1 of 5. Cobra attacks a G.I. Joe convoy and steals a high-powered experimental laser to complete their latest weapon... the weather dominator. When the Joes launch an air assault, Destro uses the device, and it's stormy skies ahead for the Joe team.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Part 2 of 5. The Joe team uses an energy mirror array to counter Cobra's Weather Dominator attack on Washington, D.C. When their defense is successful, the Weather Dominator explodes in orbit, scattering its vital components across the globe.

programme.title: Classic Albums: Def Leppard's Hysteria

programme.title: Classic Albums: Duran Duran's Rio
programme.desc: A look at the behind-the-scenes creation of the iconic Duran Duran album "Rio," released in 1982.

programme.title: Classic Albums: Elvis Presley's Elvis Presley
programme.desc: This is the story behind Elvis's first album, which features performances from 1955 and 1956, interviews with the King and rare home movies of him at play and work.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin goes on a safe-cracking rampage and rakes in 10 million francs. He needs the money to purchase the world's only rare Gold Butterfly at an auction. But Lupin drops the 10 million francs while on the run…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin scopes a jewelry museum where the billion-dollar gem Cleopatra's Tear is displayed. But Lupin can't get to it because the display case is secured by high-voltage electricity.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: No thief has ever succeeded in stealing the secret gem of Pompeii's nunnery; it's guarded by venomous snakes. Even Arsene Lupin gave up on it, since he hates snakes. But Lupin takes on the challenge. Will Lupin succeed? And what kind of secret gem is it?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Though the tycoon Steel had replaced all his bodily organs with artificial organs to live, he's told that he only has a week to live. There is only one way he could prolong his life, which is to receive a brain transplant and he wants Lupin's Brain.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Famous gourmand and field mice scientist Salmon Whitney is also known as being the chairman of a Canadian diamond mining operation. Lupin is after his diamonds, which will go on auction in Paris.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Coaxed by Fujiko, Lupin decides to steal the diamond chandelier at the Kremlin Palace. He disguises himself as Zenigata and infiltrates the palace, but government police soldier Natasha captures him and throws him in the slammer.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: England's Lord Weather provokes Lupin with a bet, and dares him to steal Red Arrow away from him. Lupin takes the challenge as it's a matter of pride, but Jigen wants no part of it because he and Weather are gambling buddies.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Miami Bank is on the verge of bankruptcy after its last customers closed their accounts. The bank manager Garlic devises a plan to revive the bank, and drums up news that his bank had been raided by Lupin; he also asks Lupin to really do it.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Thief brothers Nanja-Monja have been in the business since the days of Arsène Lupin; they decide to induct Lupin as a tourist attraction for the Republic of Karchina. But first they abduct Fujiko.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Fujiko joins Lupin and gang who are camping and cooking Sukiyaki; people are hunting Fujiko, and gunfire is exchanged. Fujiko gets captured and Lupin's Sukiyaki meal gets ruined, but he finds an atomic bomb's detonator plug inside of the Sukiyaki bowl.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Genius prodigy boy Romanoff has ten doctorates from Russia's Public Academy; blustering that no greater than he exists, he challenges Lupin. Since Fujiko is involved, Lupin cannot back down; what will become of this challenge?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Fujiko is the model for Norway's famous sculptor Vingel's crystal mermaid statue; she believed when he said he would give it to her the day it was finished, but Vingel gets greedy and sells it to the mayor of the city of Bergen instead.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin tries to steal a bunch of diamonds from a diamond auction. But the auction auditorium is at the Marine Tower above a skyscraper, and there is only one transparent elevator to get there.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin heads to Mecca to steal Mohammed's treasure. But first he is confronted by Patra Lawrence, the grandaughter of the Lawrence of Arabia, who is the chief of Mecca's special police headquarters; how will Lupin steal the treasure now?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: As usual, Fujiko instigates Lupin and friends to go steal; this time their target is the Jovich Piano installed in a music hall built around it. There is no door large enough in the hall to carry the piano out.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin is after the shipment of raw diamonds that arrived at a harbor in Nice; he sneaks into the storage in the middle of the night but Zenigata was on to him. Lupin escapes with the help of Jigen and Goemon, but Fujiko gets captured.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A month ago, president Gappolini of one of the world's top five trading companies, had died. Gappolini bequeathed a will saying that the heir to the company presidency will be the world's finest sharpshooter and Jigen is a target.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: It's said that immense sums of money confiscated from organized crime get transported to a Swiss bank by ICPO, once a year. Naturally, Lupin wants a piece of that action, so he steals the armed security vehicle along with Zenigata in it.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The city of Grand Hexagon lies at the border of France and Spain; the city is designed with six sides. But at the center of the city is Raika Bank storing fifty tons of gold bullion; an alarm will go off if even one bullion is missing.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Robot soldier Lamda flies above the sky of Tokyo, raids a jewelry store. Its creator, professor Oyamada's daughter Maki and Lupin say that it was just a show to demonstrate the inhumanity of robots.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd TVSP #13: Alcatraz Connection
programme.desc: Master thief Lupin III, gunslinger Jigen and swordmaster Goemon are back for a new caper, this time aboard the casino-ship Machine Gun Kelly. Between the mafia, interpol, and a secret organization based under Alcatraz!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd TVSP #15: Operation: Return the Treasure
programme.desc: Lupin sets his sights on the legendary Trick Diamond, stolen by his late rival Mark Williams. Instead of finding the diamond, Fujiko relays Mark's dying challenge: return all the other treasures he stole to reveal the location of the gem.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/7/52: Mickey Mantle's 6th inning home run and Billy Martin's game-saving catch help the New York Yankees win their 4th straight World Series, beating the Brooklyn Dodgers in 7 games.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/14/65: Sandy Koufax finishes a complete-game shutout in Game 7 of the 1965 World Series to bring home a championship. The Dodgers' 2-0 victory was capped in the top of the 4th inning when runs scored on a homer and an RBI single.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/15/70: After allowing three runs in the 1st inning, Mike Cuellar silenced the Reds over the next eight frames to pitch a complete game. The Orioles offense backed his start, scoring nine runs on 15 hits to take Game 5 and win the 1970 World Series.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/22/75: Tony Pérez started the Reds' comeback in Game 7, smashing a two-run home run over the Green Monster and onto Lansdowne Street. Jim Burtan scored Ken Griffey in the top of the 9th to break a 3-3 tie and give the Reds their third World Series win.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: George Brett entered the Royals' series vs. the Angels nursing a shoulder injury. After missing the first two games, Brett gave it a go in Game 3 with four hits separating him from the coveted 3,000. The Hall of Famer went 4-for-5 to reach the milestone.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/11/1977 - Paul Blair singles home Willie Randolph in the bottom of the 12th inning to give the Yankees a walk-off victory against the Dodgers in Game 1 of the 1977 World Series.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: Red Zone Cuba
programme.desc: An escaped convict and his two pals take part in the Bay of Pigs invasion, then return home with a plan to get rich.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: The Phantom Planet
programme.desc: When US astronaut Captain Frank Chapman’s military spaceship is damaged by asteroids, he lands safely on the giant asteroid Rheton.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: The Touch of Satan
programme.desc: An aimless young man encounters a rural family that seems to have some secrets.

programme.title: Backlot: MST3K 25th Anniversary
programme.desc: Part three of the complete history of MST3K takes a look at the changes the series underwent throughout the course of its run, including the host and network shifts.

programme.title: Backlot: MST3K: Santa Versus Satan
programme.desc: This episode of Backlot features an interview with some MST3K crew and other experts as they look back at this quirky Rene Cardona-directed movie.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: The Human Duplicators
programme.desc: An alien takes over a professor's mansion-basement laboratory, and makes android clones to infiltrate the government.

programme.title: MST3K: The Crawling Hand
programme.desc: Joel and the Bots have a tough time agreeing on how to spend their free time between segments of the teen sci-fi thriller "The Crawling Hand".

programme.title: MST3K: The Atomic Brain
programme.desc: A rich, elderly woman wants her doctor to transplant her brain into the body of one of her young captives.

programme.title: MST3K: The Brain That Wouldn't Die
programme.desc: New guy Mike Nelson finishes his training and makes his way into the theater. His first outing is the movie The Brain That Wouldn't Die

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: The situation forgets the plan at dinner, and then forgets he's on a TV show. And a text from back home rattles the roommates and threatens to blow the whole vacation up.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Pauly scrambles to get Deena and Angelina on board with a family dinner before Nikki arrives. But a mob of raccoons almost foils his plan. Meanwhile, back in Jersey, Jenni is having some major fomo.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Pauly brings Nikki to family dinner, and the guys hold their breath as Deena and Angelina come face to face for the first time in 10 months. But Vinny's offhanded comment about a wedding speech could derail everything.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Angelina and Deena have buried the hatchet, and the family vacation can officially begin. But Jenni's arrival is about the change everything.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: JWOWW and Angelina put the A in awkward at family dinner. Afterwards, the guys are at a loss so Ronnie calls in a favor from Dr. Drew to see if he can help bring the family back together.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Dr. Drew helps mediate the conflict between Angelina and Jenni. A messy situation is about to get messier when Deena learns her private conversation with Mike wasn't so private. Mike and Lauren get the best news of their lives.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: RSVP plan Angelina's wedding redo. Uncle Nino is officiating and Vinny is giving the wedding speech. What could go wrong?

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Ten months after a bridesmaids speech almost destroyed the family, Angelina gets her wedding redo, while Mike tries to keep his secret until after the festivities.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: The gang is back together and big changes are in the air. Pauly D has a new look, Vinny is looking for a new home, and when social media explodes with rumors about Angelina & Chris's marriage, Mike takes on a new alter ego -The Investigation.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: The honeymoon might be over for Angelina after Chris moves out. But Mike has a lot to celebrate as he reaches his five-year soberversary. To mark the occasion the roomies throw a parade in his honor and the surprise return of a certain roommate.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Snooki returns to celebrate Mike's five-year Soberversary, and the roommates begin to plan their next big family vacation. But everything comes to a screeching halt when a wild rumor surfaces involving Angelina, her marriage, and chicken tenders.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: A boozy brunch with Snooki and Angelina goes sideways when Snooki spills the beans about the video "evidence" of Angelina in Old Bridge. Chris moves back home. And the roommates head to the Poconos for their big winter vacation.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Jenni has a huge announcement. But before the celebration can begin, the roommates must deal with the elephant in the room currently casting a rather large shadow over their Poconos vacation - videos of Angelina and her mystery man in Old Bridge, NJ.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Vinny suffers an unspeakable loss; Angelina confronts Jenni about the videos; and the roommates try their hand at winter sports.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: ¡Vuelve la locura de Super Shore a las costas mediterráneas! Uno a uno llegan a la mansión, la tropa internacional de la fiesta, con una sorpresa enorme para toda la casa

programme.title: MAWY
programme.desc: Los Mawys con tequilas en mano tienen una conversación con Manuel el capataz para explicarle algunas inconformidades con los límites en el rancho. Mane le pide ayuda a Jawy para levantar su carrera musical y deciden que él será su manager.

programme.title: MAWY
programme.desc: Los Mawy reciben la visita sorpresa del socio y amigo Víctor Guadarrama. Mane y Víctor tienen un nuevo producto para lanzar y tienen una junta de trabajo para decidir nombres. Mane está muy nerviosa por decirle a Jawy quién es el modelo de la foto.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP
programme.desc: Los influencers llegan a la Villa y lo que promete ser el momento ideal para comenzar las vacaciones, se ve interrumpido por la Tablet del Terror.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP
programme.desc: Diana amenaza a Frida tras su nuevo romance con Brandon. La Sala Tornado abre sus puertas y eligen a ciegas quién es el próximo EX en llegar. Suavecito sufre por el romance de Kim e Ian.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP
programme.desc: Esteban y Aylin comienzan un romance. La llegada del nuevo EX sorprende a todos y la Tablet los manda a una cita de tres. La Sala Tornado pone las cartas sobre la mesa. Brandon toma una decisión importante.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP
programme.desc: La tensión parece calmarse tras la reconciliación entre Diana y Brandon. Camilo y David tienen una plática sincera y Kelly aclara sus intenciones con Karen. Daphne saca su furia y arremte contra Aylin.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP
programme.desc: Dos nuevos EX llegan a la Villa y se desatan los celos. Diana deja las cosas claras con Brandon en la Love Suite. Todos disfrutan de un día fuera de la Villa y el alcohol les ayuda a encararse.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP
programme.desc: Esteban busca hacer un trío y Aylin busca exclusividad. Llega un nuevo EX y hace que Frida respire de nuevo. Diana esta insegura de Brandon. Kelly es mas territorial con Robbie por culpa de Michelle.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP
programme.desc: En medio de una fiesta, Camilo se casa con David en el peor momento y se abre la Sala Tornado desatando nuevos conflictos. Kim va por Ian, mientras que Suavecito llama a no engancharse con sus parejas.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP
programme.desc: Karen y Suavecito se van a una cita y se desatan los celos incontrolables de Kim y se despide de Ian. La peluca María José trae revelaciones importantes y llega un nuevo EX a saldar cuentas.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP
programme.desc: Frida y Brandon se reencuentran y Diana toma cartas en el asunto. Kim y Suavecito se besan apasionadamente pero Ian tiene un As bajo la manga. La llegada de un nuevo Ex y alguien es expulsado.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP
programme.desc: La Sala Tornado llama a votaciones. Algunos se van de fiesta a una casa flotante. La salida de Daphne se convierte en el pretexto para hacer explotar una bomba de tiempo que provoca una gran pelea.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP
programme.desc: Una dinámica los obliga a decirse las cosas de frente. Michelle y Kelly arreglan sus diferencias en la Sala Tornado. Salen por grupos a disfrutar de Colombia. Festejan el cumpleaños de Diana.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP
programme.desc: Las vacaciones llegaron a su fin y las relaciones comienzan un nuevo ciclo en un barco a Cartagena. David y Camilo aclaran los malentendidos. Hacen un último brindis todos juntos.

programme.desc: What other country can pride itself on having eaten organic food for the past 20 years, on deriving 30% of its energy from renewable sources, being a pioneer in ecotourism, and having a Ministry for Climate Change? The answer? Cuba!

programme.title: Diana: 7 días que conmocionaron al mundo
programme.desc: El 31 de agosto de 1997, la princesa Diana muere en un trágico accidente de auto. La serie revela los preparativos y las negociaciones que se llevaron a cabo mientras la monarquía y sus asesores luchaban por proteger a los príncipes William y Harry.

programme.title: Diana: 7 días que conmocionaron al mundo
programme.desc: La parte final se centra en los planes logísticos para el funeral de Diana y en el propio día de la mudanza, así como en entrevistas muy reveladoras con el mayordomo de Diana durante diez años, Paul Burrell, y su secretario privado, Patrick Jephson.

programme.title: El precio de la historia
programme.desc: Rick mataría por tener un sombrero y una pistola que pertenecían a uno de los hombres de los que se sospechaba que era Jack el Destripador. Corey trabaja horas extra para adquirir un reloj de 1920.

programme.title: El precio de la historia
programme.desc: Rick ve un Ferrari 308 de 1984 que espera poderse llevar manejando. ¿Podrá acelerar un trato o el precio tan alto frenará las negociaciones? Corey está muy dispuesto a escuchar cuando un vendedor le trae un reproductor de música de los años treinta.

programme.title: El precio de la historia
programme.desc: Un vendedor despierta interés por sus discos de vinilo de Led Zeppelin, los que le suenan muy bien a Rick y a Chum. ¿Harán suficiente ruido estos álbumes como para pagar mucho por ellos?

programme.title: El precio de la historia
programme.desc: Un vendedor acude a los expertos del empeño para mostrarles un artículo utilizado en la película "Volver al futuro II". Rick se siente pasado de moda cuando llega a él un extraño calendario de 1900 de una empresa de químicos.

programme.title: El precio de la historia
programme.desc: Rick va a Washington D. C. a ver uno de los primeros Jeep, el cual fue fabricado para la Segunda Guerra Mundial. Aprovechando que está en D. C., visita una librería de tomos antiguos para ver un libro de alquimia.

programme.title: El precio de la historia
programme.desc: Este episodio de "El precio de la historia" levanta vuelo con una edición original de 1911 de la novela "Peter Pan": ¿la adquirirá Rick o preferirá gastarse sus recursos en un pedazo de metal de una aeronave?

programme.title: El precio de la historia
programme.desc: Rick ve una espada con pistola del siglo XVIII. ¿Le dará al blanco del trato o le saldrá el tiro por la culata? Llega a la escena un retrato del legendario actor de cine y teatro John Barrymore.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Existen algunos lazos que no pueden romperse, tal como el vínculo que se establece entre una madre y su hija... o el vínculo psíquico entre un asesino y su víctima.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Los nuevos comienzos son siempre emocionantes. Pero sin importar cuánto deseemos que ocurran, siempre llegan con cierto grado de ansiedad y dificultad.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: El estrés puede tener efectos poderosos y destructivos. Puede debilitar tanto el cuerpo como la mente, puede deteriorar las relaciones e incluso puede hacer que un alma se vuelva vulnerable a lo sobrenatural.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Incluso los lugares más inofensivos pueden guardar las cicatrices de un pasado retorcido. El mal puede perdurar a través del tiempo, puede permanecer latente hasta que alguna persona ingenua o algún inocente se crucen en su camino sin darse cuenta.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: El nacimiento y la muerte son etapas naturales de la vida. Sin embargo, algunas veces la muerte no es el capítulo final. A menudo, espíritus inquietos deambulan por la tierra buscando atormentar con su furia eterna a los vivos.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: En la isla de Taiwán muchas personas creen que no existen fronteras entre el mundo material y el reino espiritual. Los fantasmas forman parte de la vida cotidiana.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: ¿Qué tan diferente podría ser nuestra realidad si no pudiéramos sentir y comunicarnos de las formas más convencionales? Para Marie, este es un tema que forma parte de su día a día. Su hija Julie padece un problema mental que la debilita.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: En este mundo, la verdadera maldad existe. Acecha dentro de las sombras más oscuras, así como en los lugares más sencillos. Se disfraza con muchas máscaras para engañarnos y, finalmente, destruirnos.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: En la vida, las personas pueden vivir atormentadas por sus propios crímenes. Lo mismo también puede ocurrir en la muerte: espíritus enojados pueden quedar varados en el mismo lugar donde perdieron su humanidad.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: La dinámica de las personas que viven bajo un mismo techo debe tener un equilibrio delicado. Mike y su novia, Lisa, mantienen una relación sana y, sin nada que les preocupe, se mudan juntos, pero no están solos en su nueva casa.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: En la inocencia de la infancia, el miedo es perfecto y no resulta influenciado por la racionalidad adulta, lo cual supone que se puede comprender a cabalidad el mundo que nos rodea.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: En la Biblia se relata una historia en la cual Jesús y sus discípulos un día se toparon con un paria que se encontraba poseído. Cuando Jesús le preguntó a ese hombre cómo se llamaba, este le respondió que, dentro de él.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Cuando Clara y su familia se mudan a una pequeña casa en la zona rural de Hinsdale, Nueva York, se dan cuenta de que la paz de la vida en el campo es simplemente una ilusión y que la amenaza de muerte es muy real.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: La casa de rancho de Ed y Beth parece el lugar perfecto para criar a su niño pequeño hasta que descubren que no están solos, y una espesa niebla oscura se cierne sobre la casa y crece día a día.

programme.title: Descubriendo el mundo
programme.desc: Históricamente, Mallorca ha capturado la fantasía de los artistas de todo el mundo a lo largo de los años, ya que Miró, Picasso, Dalí, Chopin y Sand cayeron bajo el hechizo de la irresistible Mallorca.

programme.title: Descubriendo el mundo
programme.desc: La gente de la isla de Honshu encuentra su equilibrio en las palabras, la sabiduría y la armonía del zen. Las tradiciones, como los festivales, se conservan con mucho cuidado, pero en estos días tecnología se ha extendido por todo el país.

programme.desc: Hosted by Kirk Fogg, this fantasy action game show takes kids on adventures that test their intelligence, physical prowess and determination as they search for legendary artifacts. Each episode revolves around a myth or a story based on fact.

programme.title: Are You Smarter Than a 5th Grader?
programme.desc: This law enforcement officer is all about following the rules until he's caught without an answer! Will he cheat to move up the money ladder?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Josh is furious that his girlfriend Kathryn may be cheating on him… with his brother! Shandi thinks her boyfriend is living a second life with a secret family. Will Nikita cancel her nuptials to Patrick after she watches the hidden camera video?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Ashley found her own cousin's panties in her boyfriend Jeff's gym bag and photos of them in the club. Is he cheating on her? Then, will Brandy's cheating evidence prove her hunches right? Later, Patricia's best friend has a shocking secret!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: The wedding is already planned, but Autumn caught Antoine cheating with her best friend of 10 years and suspects he may be detailing cars for sex. Then Ricky confessed to his fiancée Chelsea that he had sex with her step-mom Tecki, but is he lying?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Monica was in a relationship with Deshan. But he and his Mother Tayama claim that it was only a one-time fling. Later, rumors are stopping Joshua from claiming Deshan's son, Joshua Jr! Who is the biological father of Joshua Jr?

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: They say you never forget your first time well these guests are here to live out their unforgettable first-time fantasies.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Tara tells her sister that she's sleeping with her boyfriend and he's been paying her! Next Christina says she loves Mitchell, but he hasn't been treating her right. Then Carla's husband wanted her out of his life so he set her up with his cousin!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Christina is a dial-a-date telephone operator. She is here to confront the woman who is trying to steal her man! Next Tika says her boyfriend is trying to move his other lover, Cherly, into their home!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Lynne kicked her husband out for cheating and now he's living in her front yard in a box! Next Sam says he's always wanted to see 2 women sleep together so he made a peculiar agreement with his cousin.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Cece wants her boyfriend Leon to change his behavior toward her! Now, Lakeasha says Terrance has started controlling her every move and he constantly accuses her of cheating but she still plans to marry him next month!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Kevis suspects Ashley of cheating, while she accuses him of infidelity. With a lie detector test, Steve aims to uncover the truth and shock them both. Secrets will be revealed, challenging their perceptions and relationship.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: 17-year-old Naomi has undergone a sudden attitude change and is on a mission to have a baby. Parents Leeanders and April need Steve to intervene!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Trish says that her on-and-off boyfriend Jake is awful and cheating, but Jake says she's lying. Will Chante's lie detector test results finally convince Walter that she's not cheating and ready for a relationship?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Latoya is worried that her sister Tenielle's boyfriend Ashley is too close to Tenielle's daughter! Latoya and the child's father Antonio are here because they demand Ashley prove his innocence with a lie detector test!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Did You Murder My Daughter?
programme.desc: Teenager Megan lives with her older controlling boyfriend Rick. Megan cannot attend school, find a job, or even eat without his OK! Can her aunt and Steve get through to her?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Kayla's madly in love with Levi, her baby's father, whom she's been dating for years. But this relationship is far from ordinary. A few months back, Kayla's 17-year-old sister accused Levi of taking advantage of her while sleeping.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Russell quiere volver a reunir a su familia luego de que sus 3 hijos murieron en un incendio. Después, Tatiana cree que su sobrino de 2 años sufrió abusos. Además, acusa al ex-prometido de su hermana, Chris. Chris dice que no es un abusador.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Curtis se sentó con su madre Telisha, y le dijo que está tratando de tener un bebé, pero Telisha se horrorizó y se preocupó porque Curtis apenas tiene 13 años. Curtis asegura que está listo para ser padre.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Kelsey dice que su marido la maltrata. Malcolm cree que Kelsey le ha sido infiel desde el principio y que sus dos hijos pueden ser de otro hombre. Además, el novio de Carrie, Chris, cree que su hijo es de su ex.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Monique quiere probar que Chris la atacó cuando la llevó a casa después de una fiesta. Chris niega haber hecho algo malo y dice que Monique estaba demasiado borracha como para ser consciente de lo que pasó.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Devon entró en coma y está conectado a un sistema de soporte vital. Antes de caer en coma, le dijo a su madre que su ex, Alisha, le dijo que no era el padre de su hijo. Alisha niega haber dicho esto y siente que toda su familia le ha dado la espalda.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Bambi nos da una rara y honesta perspectiva de su ultra exclusivo estilo de vida en Los Ángeles. Tiffany se enfrenta a C.T. por un feo negocio.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: No hay peor momento para pelearse con la familia que durante las vacaciones. ¡Nuestros viejos amigos Donna y su marido infiel Richard nos acompañan en festividades!

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Jerry tiene 58 años y ha pasado por tres cambios importantes. Actualmente está felizmente comprometido con una mujer que se llama Joy y habla de su pasada confusión en cuanto al género.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: ¡Amigos y familiares se niegan a aceptar el matrimonio entre personas del mismo sexo! Martín no quiere que su hijo se case con su novio. Abril quiere recuperar a su ex, ¡pero está enamorado de un hombre! ¿Quién tiene la última palabra?

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Chrishon niega estar comprometido con Taiwana a tres semanas de su boda. ¡Lauren se enfrenta a su ex por dejarla por otra mujer mientras está embarazada! Dave todavía quiere que Leesa lo ame.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Chloe y Dan se casarán pronto, pero finalmente está lista para contarle a él en qué trabaja de verdad. Entonces la madre de Amanda le ruega que renuncie a su trabajo.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Torrance admite haber sido infiel a su novia con un giro sorprendente. Entonces, Heather quiere que Tramisha, el ex de su novio, deje de interferir en su relación.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Harta del maltrato en su relación, Carla le dice a su novio que es infiel con su compañero de cuarto. Luego, Jay quiere decirle a Nikki que ella se acostó con su amante Crystal.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Shianne confiesa que fue infiel a Mistress Delicious con su mamá Blonde. Después, la madre del bebé de Chris se enfrenta a él por dejarla por su compañera de trío.

programme.title: Acorralada
programme.desc: Octavia va a la casa donde vive Paola y se encuentra con la sorpresa de que la otra esposa de Pancholón es nada más y nada menos que Caramelo.

programme.title: Acorralada
programme.desc: Silvia planea que cuando se confirme la desaparición definitiva de Diana, ella le confesará a Maximiliano la verdad que el hijo de Diana es de él.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Doña Cruz está consolando a su nieta, Rosaura, y al abrazarla cae desploma sobre la cama. Patricio habla con su abogado, con la intención de quitarle todo a Doña Cruz.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Jimena se encuentra con Iván en el cementerio y allí él le dice cuanto la desprecia por la muerte de su hijo, quien había nacido con problemas por culpa de su vicio con el alcohol.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Gabriel le cuenta a Eduarda que Jimena fue encontrada robando una botella en una licorería, que fue entregada a la policía y él tuvo que ir con Luis Mario a sacarla de la comisaría.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Patricio recibe un documento de su abogado, en el cual Doña Cruz pasa todos sus bienes a nombre de él.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: La boda de Rafael y Claudia se va a realizar y todos se están presentes, Eduarda tiene planes de matar a Rosaura con el veneno que le compró a la vidente.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Esther le pide a Mercedes que se tranquilice, que ella le va a decir quien es su hijo pero que debe jurarle que nunca se acercará a él. Mercedes se lo jura.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: A su llegada del entierro de Rafael, Doña Cruz se enfrenta con Patricio, quien la llena de preguntas sobre Luis Mario.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario conduce a Rosaura a un paraíso lleno de flores, en donde los dos se olvidan de su sufrimiento para dar rienda suelta a su deseo de estar para siempre juntos.

programme.desc: Ivory Hecker Tonight is an uncensored political news talk show that prioritizes filling in the blanks when politicians and media outlets lie through omission. Ivory prioritizes curiosity and citizen questions over loyalty to any political party.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro and Kin'emon make a mad dash to save Law but Navy Admiral Fujitora stands in their way, bringing his full power against them. The Navy is in hot pursuit as a ship approaches with unexpected visitors from the past.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: After revealing the horrible history of Dressrosa, Toy Soldier now shares their plan to liberate the Tontatta Kingdom and bring down the Doflamingo Family, Operation SOP. Luffy bumps into a heavily-wounded Bellamy and Bartolomeo

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Usopp and Robin make their way via an underground tunnel dug by the tiny people of the Tontatta Tribe - a tunnel so small in fact, that Franky couldn't fit! Instead, Franky makes his way to the Toy House.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: As the contenders for the battle of Block D dwindle to only thirty, Rebecca has her hands full with the menacing Suleiman the Beheader! All hope seems lost that she can take him down and move on to the finals!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The battle for Block D comes to a shocking end and the winner that emerges from the cloud of dust stuns the audience even more! Meanwhile, Luffy, Zoro, Kin'emon, and Wicka of the Tontatta Tribe are about to reach the lift to the palace.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Viola, aka Violet, once a great princess of the Dressrosa family, shows Luffy & the others a secret entrance into the palace which avoids the use of the heavily-guarded lift. In the palace's Suit Chamber, Navy Admiral Fujitora reveals his plans.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The final round at the Corrida Colosseum finally begins, as Diamante joins the combatants in an all-out struggle to win the Flare-Flare Fruit! As the stakes escalate, can one champion beat the others & snatch the fruit from the Colosseum's newest hazard?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and his group continue their ascent towards Doflamingo's inner sanctum, but standing in their way is an executive of the family whose power is so strong moving past him seems impossible! Meanwhile, Cavendish learns the dark secrets of Dressrosa.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: As Operation SOP finally gets underway but as Leo makes the dash to hide the Tatabasco grape in Sugar's fruit basket, Robin calls for an emergency stop to the plan! Meanwhile, Luffy, Violet, and Zoro are stalled by Pica whose sheer size overwhelms them.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Operation SOP is underway and nearing its final stage! But Trebol proves a far stronger guard for Sugar than was expected, so Robin hatches a plan to lure him away. But is there enough time to execute the plan before the ruse is discovered?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Tontattas are devastated by Trebol's furious attack, but as Usopp tries to convince Leo to abort the operation, Leo tells him about their commander Toy Soldier's stunning true identity! The Toy Soldier finally shakes off Lao G and gets moving again!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro continues his deadly duel with the nearly indestructible Pica! While the Toy Soldier narrowly escapes Lao G only to come face to face with Gladius! Luffy continues his mad dash to the top of the palace to face Doflamingo!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: With the Tontattas beaten, Robin turned into a toy, and Luffy, Franky, and the others busy elsewhere, Usopp is the last hope for Operation SOP! But will he be able to muster the confidence and courage to face the terrible Trebol?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Usopp runs into trouble in his battle with Treebol, and flashback sheds light on how a young Kyros made the shocking transition from murderer to one of King Riku's most trusted men.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: In the Royal Palace, Viola, Luffy, and the Toy Soldier have hidden themselves outside Doflamingo's chamber, only to have more enemies approach from behind, leaving them surrounded! Meanwhile, Franky is knocked out cold by the Navy.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Toys all across Dressrosa regain their human form, a flood of forgotten memories return, and Kyros launches a long overdue attack on the villainous tyrant Doflamingo!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Kyros finally taking down Doflamingo leaves Doflamingo's clan shocked! Meanwhile at the Colosseum, Rebecca gets her memories of her loving father Kyros back, and Sabo makes a move to end the championship battle by blowing up the whole ring!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy hurries to free Law, but with their pirate alliance dissolved, will Law still see Luffy as an ally? Meanwhile, Usopp has convinced his newfound followers to destroy the factory! Doflamingo's defeat has thrown Dressrosa into chaos.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The mystery of Doflamingo's return from the dead is revealed! But there isn't much time to ponder how it happened, as his plan to silence the country of Dressrosa unfolds, spelling doom for the Straw Hats!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: As the people of Dressrosa see their friends and loved ones slaughter each other under the manipulation of Doflamingo, memories of 10 years ago rush back, and the truth of that event becomes clear. Doflamingo announces the rules for his deadly game.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Doflamingo and Fujitora's agreement to not engage each other lasts for the moment - meaning all eyes are turned towards taking down the Straw Hats and claiming the rewards! And as Luffy starts heading to the Royal Palace, Fujitora stands in his way!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Robin, Usopp, the Tontattas and the others make moves to rejoin Luffy as Doflamingo's deadly game rages on! Meanwhile, Kin'emon makes it to the trash heap in his search for his friend Kanjuro - just as Pica emerges in the town.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: With Luffy & the others recovering from Pica's attack, the game is afoot! Luffy has just enough time to regroup and set out to find Doflamingo, only to find that the dastardly Warlord has more enemies than he might realize! A strange argument breaks out.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Don Chin Jao and Elizabello successfully break Pica's giant arm but the rock giant is unfazed and starts throwing even more destructive punches at Luffy and his band of unwanted collaborators! Meanwhile, Navy Admiral Fujitora moves into action.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and Moocy fast approach the showdown with Doflamingo - while the others with a beef against him continue to tag along. Meanwhile, Violet finds the key to Law's handcuffs, and Rebecca pledges to deliver it to him.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy makes headway toward Doflamingo's refuge, making his way through Doflamingo's guards, while down below Admiral Fujitora faces off against Sabo, who has the power of the Fire Fist from eating the Flare-Flare Fruit!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy cuts a lucky break as Kelly Funk shows him a shortcut to the Palace! But all may not be as it seems... Meanwhile, Franky and Zoro are locked in one-on-one duels, while Robin, Rebecca, and Bartolomeo enlist the help of the Tontattas.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: While carrying an abnormal, Will and Magnus' helicopter crashes on a decommissioned oil rig.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Helen reunites with Jimmy who transports an elemental Abnormal to the Sanctuary. However, they are tracked down by the underground Mobsters. Kate proves her loyalty and bonds with Jimmy over a common history they share.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Magnus and Will investigate the disappearances of teenagers with links to them spending time at a rehab clinic in Mexico. Magnus and Will are shocked to see Nikola Tesla as the program director. Tesla reveals the treatment he has been using on the teen...

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: The resistance races against time to infiltrate a remote Taelon lab to destroy the alien probe which holds the liberation movement's secrets. Vint Cerf, “Father of the Internet”, makes a special guest star appearance.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: The renegade alien Ha'gel appears on Earth to exact revenge on the Taelons for destroying his race.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: When Quo'on (Brooke Johnson), the leader of the Taelon Synod is assassinated, the ruthless Zo'or (Anita La Selva) rises as successor and Captain Liam Kincaid (Robert Leeshock) emerges as a new fighter in the underground.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: Augur (Richard Chevolleau) unwittingly puts Da'an's (Leni Parker) life at risk when he replaces him in the Taelon Commonality, causing Da'an to regress into a primitive monster the Synod wants to kill.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: An agent of the Abyss tries to lure Harper into joining the Magog.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: When they rescue a young prince from an uprising that kills the rest of his family, Dylan and Tyr are asked to be his advisers.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Dylan and his new Commonwealth fleet take on the Drago-Kazov fleet but find it much larger than he expected.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: The Magog eggs in Harper are starting to hatch, so the team builds a Tesseract Machine. After unintended time shifts, Trance is replaced by her future self.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Dylan takes over a tourist barge in an attempt to escape mercenaries.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: A body identification goes awry when it turns out Beka's former crewmate isn't dead at all.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Andromeda rescues dying people from a drift, but they soon turn into zombies being controlled by a hive-mind.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: In the summer of 1976, the NYPD are chasing a man shooting at couples in parked cars with a gigantic, .44 caliber handgun; he taunts the city with terrifying letters until police get a lead about a suspect who has shot a neighbor's dog.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer

programme.desc: Come spin up some excitement with the Cajun Pawn Stars. The team checks out a rare first album by musical legend Jerry Lee Lewis, and later come across a mischievous pygmy goat for sale.

programme.title: Cajun Pawn Stars: Shoeshine Mike
programme.desc: In the southern United States, roots run deep and the region's rich history is full of treasures. The team uncovers some of these amazing gems.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: The guys head to the Lone Star State, hoping to uncover a Texas-size honey hole. Once there, Mike and Frank dig through a huge outbuilding filled with dead coin-operated games.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Thousands of miles from home, the guys are scouring the back roads of Texas desperate to find the big-ticket item that will make the long trip worthwhile. Just like his late father, Aardean is a funeral director who never throws anything away.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Looking for picks in Texas, the guys see a sign for Gilley's Club, the honky-tonk club made famous in the 1980 film Urban Cowboy. Soon they're face to face with country music superstar Mickey Gilley himself.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: The guys head to Michigan hoping to strike automotive gold in the heart of America's car capital. Clearing the contents of derelict storage lockers, Brian's sprawling auction house is a picker's playground.

programme.title: Cajun Pawn Stars: Money Bzzzness
programme.desc: Jimmie's team seeks to dip into the buzzing business of beekeeping. Will they fly away with a sweet deal or get stung in the process?

programme.title: Cajun Pawn Stars: Joker's Big Score
programme.desc: Jimmie looks over a classic police car, while Joker stumbles upon a profitable piece.

programme.title: Cajun Pawn Stars: Trick or Trade
programme.desc: Jimmie's cousin looks to broker a deal on an airboat, but an engine failure leaves them floating in the swamp. Back at the shop, the team encounters some rare Civil War journals.

programme.title: Cajun Pawn Stars: Joker's Wild
programme.desc: The guys check out a Greyhound bus rumored to have belonged to country music legend Barbara Madrell. Then they find out if a flintlock gun was really brought to Louisiana by pirates.

programme.title: Cajun Pawn Stars: Speed Demons
programme.desc: The guys are flying high when they get a chance to purchase a rare World War II biplane. Then, Abraham Lincoln's lock of hair is up for grabs while Johnnie and Tammie feel the need for speed when a customer attempts sell his Mako fishing boat.

programme.title: Cajun Pawn Stars: Gimme Some Skin

programme.title: Cajun Pawn Stars: Some Pig
programme.desc: Shoe Shine Mike looks to sell Penelope, his champion show pig. Tammie and Jimmy check out a 1900s dentist chair, and Joker believes he has a walking stick used by Native American legend Geronimo.

programme.title: Cajun Pawn Stars: Buy George!

programme.title: American Pickers

programme.title: American Pickers

programme.title: American Pickers

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Trouble comes to Mission Hills, California when a mysterious new bidder aims to dominate the competition.

programme.title: Storage Wars

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Varios intentos para detener a un conductor fugitivo valen la pena. Un conductor se enoja cuando la policía va descubriendo su secreto. La policía se separa para capturar a un joven ciclista.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un hombre inocente se asusta cuando un motociclista fugitivo choca en su remolque. Un sospechoso se hace el desentendido. Los oficiales se decepcionan al enfrentar a un hombre con antecedentes.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un joven no puede entender la magnitud de su error. Una mujer aprende a no subirse en autos desconocidos. Problemas matrimoniales se descontrolan cuando un marido recoge a su esposa de la cárcel.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un sospechoso muy lento acepta que no puede escapar de la ley. Los oficiales tratan de reconstruir una pelea salvaje entre vecinos. Un exnovio vengativo intenta extorcionar a su exnovia pero termina inesperadamente mal.

programme.title: Escobar: La herencia maldita
programme.desc: Cómo Pablo Escobar fue derrocado por las autoridades, y qué legado había significado su muerte para su heredero, Juan Pablo Escobar.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un conductor expone a su esposa en una persecución de alta velocidad. Un hombre paranoico se desquita con los coches de sus compañeros. Un ratero boca suelta no puede dejar de mentir.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un hombre abandona a su amigo y escapa. La pasajera de un vehículo que huye de la policía jura que no conoce al chofer, pero sus registros la desmienten. Los oficiales encuentran a un fugitivo en un lugar inesperado.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Una mujer no quiere que interrumpan su paseo nocturno. Un pésimo conductor tiene consecuencias al jugar con la vida de personas inocentes. Una cita termina con un accidente de carro y dos esposados.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: La policía hace un análisis forense cuando dos sospechosos niegan la evidencia de cigarrillos. La cena se arruina cuando un compañero lanza puñetazos. Un hombre sostiene que le están tendiendo una trampa.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un hombre quiere confrontar a su esposa por sus acusaciones graves. Los oficiales quedan perplejos cuando un sospechoso explica sus pertenencias con mucho detalle. Un conductor mentiroso es desmentido.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un sospechoso entra en pánico cuando descubren sus planes. Una mujer comete una violación de tránsito mientras va al salón de belleza. Una relación intensa termina en golpes.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Una situación de alto riesgo sirve como lección. Un sospechoso despistado intenta conseguir dinero estafando a dos detectives. Una conductora se mete en problemas por no saber contar.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Hay un duelo entre oficiales y fugitivo. Les sale el tiro por la culata a dos hermanos fingiendo estar calmados. Una pelea insignificante entre vecinos se intensifica cuando uno recurre a la venganza.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Los oficiales rastrean a un ladrón de tiendas que se dedica exclusivamente a hurtar productos de bebés. Un novio angustiado no puede soportar más su complicada relación.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un conductor lleva a su hija peque˜ña en el asiento trasero cuando atropella a un ciclista y huye. Un robo dirige a la policía hacia una mujer loca con artículos desagradables. Un hijastro comienza a actuar erráticamente y acaba mal.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un pasajero salta del carro en persecución. Un hombre ingenuo se ve en peligro cuando trata de ganar dinero fácil. Un oficial investiga a un hombre que reconoce caminando en una calle oscura.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un hombre con orden de arresto se atreve a escapar de los oficiales. Agentes encubiertos llevan a cabo una operación en un área de prostitución. Una pelea entre primos se descontrola cuando alguien saca un cuchillo.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un hombre amenaza a sus vecinos y luego lanza su ira contra los oficiales. Un sospechoso culpa a su amigo por lo que los agentes encuentran en su pantalón. Un conductor en crisis arriesga la vida de todos.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un retén se complica cuando un sospechoso crea una distracción momentánea. Un hombre se niega a dar su nombre real, pero los oficiales encuentran una pista. Un conductor se niega a declarar con la verdad.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Una mujer buscada por la policía intenta mentirles a los agentes pero es delatada por su hermano. Las verduras enlatadas vuelan durante una pelea entre compañeras. Una pareja aprende el valor de la honestidad.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un hombre da su perspectiva sobre su propio arresto. Los oficiales tienen que lidiar con un hombre agresivo y salsa de BBQ. Una persecución a baja velocidad termina en casa de la novia del conductor.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: El pasajero de un auto en persecución logra escapar, pero el conductor no. Un motociclista fugitivo casi pierde a otra patrulla antes de estrellarse. Una mujer acusa a un hombre de querer robarle el pelo.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un conductor de un vehículo todo terreno casi atropella a los oficiales. Una sospechosa llora cuando descubren sus mentiras. Un asaltador despierta con un mensaje que prueba su culpabilidad.

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un pasajero causa problemas en una parada de tránsito. Una familia se llena de alegría cuando recuperan a su cachorro robado. Una mujer batalla con baches en su camino a la recuperación.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Una lucha entre hermanos enfurecidos termina con un apuñalamiento. Se detiene a un hombre delirante después que atacó a su hermano y a su vecino. La policía encuentra a una pareja en una casa ajena.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: In an alternate universe, Detective John Sheppard is with the Las Vegas Police Department and begins to investigate a strange series of murders believed to be the work of a bizarre serial killer. Has life changed or is this a dangerous Wraith plot?

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Puzzled over the hive ship's sudden departure, the team picks up a weak subspace signal in Wraith code. Once deciphered, their worst fears are realized. The Wraith message contains a familiar set of coordinates. The hive ship is on its way to Earth!

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: A new Stargate team, lead by Dr. Elizabeth Weir (Torri Higginson) embarks on a dangerous mission to a distant galaxy , where they discover the mythical lost city of Atlantis -- and a deadly new enemy that feeds on human fear. Part 1 of 2.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: A new Stargate team, lead by Dr. Elizabeth Weir (Torri Higginson) embarks on a dangerous mission to a distant galaxy, where they discover the mythical lost city of Atlantis -- and a deadly new enemy. Part 2 of 2.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: McKay (David Hewlett) volunteers to be the first to try Beckett's (Paul McGillion) newest ATA gene therapy. But things go wrong when the device cannot be removed, and is stopping Dr. McKay from being able to eat or drink and endangering his life.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: While exploring a new planet, Lt. Scott is attacked by an aggressive plant-like creature that infects him. Scott's circumstances turn dire and Tamara must search for a way to stop the alien infection from spreading while more creatures move in.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: Col. Young (Louis Ferreira) is plagued by a recurring vision wherein Destiny is attacked and destroyed by aliens. After placing the crew on high alert, he starts to feel that he may be losing his mind and questions his ability as the commander!

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: When Destiny comes upon a heavily damaged ship, Dr. Rush and Col. Young decide to make a dangerous space-suited expedition to the ship. But an unexpected turn of events leaves Dr. Rush and Col. Young stranded aboard the strange vessel.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: Lucian Alliance prisoner Simeon escapes, creating a manhunt on a remote planet. But Homeworld Command orders he be captured alive, believing Simeon has valuable information. Simeon must be brought back to the Destiny before he kills or is killed.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-1 responds to a cry for help from a doomed civilization, which promises to give Earthlings access to advanced technology in exchange for supplies that would help them defeat their enemies. But they soon discover that SG-1 may not be helping.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: Lord Betrayus plans to render Pac powerless – by getting Inky, Blinky, Pinky and Clyde to feed Pac so much he'll be too full to eat anything else... power berries or ghosts! But Pac isn't getting full, even when he's eating everything in both worlds!

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: Pac and his pals grow suspicious when President Spheros starts behaving strangely. They eventually realize that Spheros has been possessed. Unfortunately, he declares Pac and pals Public Enemies and puts out a city wide Pac-Man-Hunt!

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: Pac gets a huge zit right before Class Picture Day. The more stressed Pac gets about it, the more zits appear, so Betrayus sends his meanest-mouthed ghosts to stress him to the breaking point - or in this case - popping point!

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: Pac-Man is physically controlled by Betrayus when he swallows a special micro-chip, and Pac's friends must help him infiltrate the Netherworld spy-style to retrieve the remote controller.

programme.desc: Catelyn chooses adoption during a weekend retreat with other birth moms, while Maci and Ryan reach out to a counselor. Amber thinks about accepting help from her ex, and Farrah wonders if she should stay home more with her baby.

programme.desc: Amber wants to put an end to the fighting and move away from Gary. Farrah can't stand living under her parents' roof anymore. Maci struggles to keep up in school when her son starts walking. Catelyn and Tyler plan their future.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Farrah calls the police on her own mother. Amber faces a pregnancy scare. Maci takes her ex, Ryan, to court for child support. Catelynn is upset that she has to move out of her boyfriend's house and back in with her family.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Catelynn gets caught in a lie. Amber's boyfriend might leave her for someone else. Farrah juggles college, a new job, and moving houses - all with her daughter Sophia. Maci tries to move into a house with her college friends.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Maci reconnects with an old flame on Valentine's Day. Their crying baby and unrealistic expectations ruin Amber and Gary's romantic dinner. Catelynn's boyfriend struggles about the adoption. Farrah reveals an emotional secret.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Amber and Gary take a vacation. Maci and Ryan butt heads over Ryan's new girlfriend. Farrah's mom is offered a plea bargain for their physical altercation. Catelynn finds out Tyler is still angry at her about a past lie.
