programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: In an effort to teach their family about teamwork, Tip and Tameka take the kids to Space Camp. But when the kids have a difficult time working together, their mission becomes jeopardized. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: When Tameka finally convinces Tip to get the kids something they've wanted for years, the kids are ecstatic. But before it becomes official the kids are put to the test to see if they are responsible enough for something this big. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: When Russell Simmons stops by the Harris home he and Domani hit it off. With Niq Niq getting ready to leave the nest Tameka is having a hard time letting go and arranges a day for their friends to spend together to give them life advice. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: To set an example for her children, Tameka is motivated to hit the books and get her GED. Meanwhile, with his teenage sons racking up the phone bill, Tip takes them to a place where they can earn money - the hard way. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: Shekinahshe seeks help from Tameka to try and find an assistant who can handle her growing work load and personal life. With Domani spending more time in the recording studio, Tip wants him to experience the full studio life. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: When King and Major rattle off a list of what they want to be when they grow up, Tameka decides to expose the boys to alternative options to expand their horizons. Tip makes a Make-A-Wish recipient's dream come true. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: When Tip chaperones Major's field trip to the fire station he takes it to another level with a surprise the kids will never forget. Meanwhile, Tameka's on a mission to get her mom out of the house after her dad's recent passing. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: Majors first dance but he has to overcome his fears and ask a girl out on a date, learn to dance, get a suit and corsage. Will Major nerves get the best of him when the big moment comes?

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: The Harris family is embarking on a new business venture together - lemonade! The kids decide they want to start a lemonade business and Tip and Tameka are there to help them every step of the way.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: Shekinah has a new hair product for sale and she wants to promote it by enlisting Tameka's help in producing an infomercial. Meanwhile, Tip takes his sons to a very special event.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: Shekinah's chain smoking is driving Tameka crazy so she decides to take her to a hypnotist. Tip takes the kids to his old neighborhood where he shocks them with a very interesting hometown game.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: Tameka and Shekinah decide to compete in a series of athletic events to determine who's the better athlete with the loser answering to King. Tip takes Domani and Messiah to a real science lab to learn about cool experiments.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: Tameka and Shekinah decide to go out to the country for some fun, but quickly learn country living is tougher than it looks. Back at home, Messiah has gotten himself into a sticky situation and asks Tip for help.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: Tip arrives home to find Precious out of sorts. The boys have been running rampant in the house and Precious can't take it anymore. Tip decides it's time once again for T.I. P.I. to do an all-out investigation into her claims.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: Tip decides to teach Major the art of Pranking. Meanwhile, Niq Niq and Deyjah convince Tameka to take them out for a day of adventure. Tameka agrees but reveals she has ulterior motives.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: Tameka asks Major to take her out on a pretend-date so King can teach Major how to be a gentleman. But when they get to the arcade, Major has other plans. Meanwhile, Tip is convinced he should have his own cooking show.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: After a string of painfully punny jokes, Tip decides Domani needs lessons in the art of comedy from one of his famous friends. Meanwhile, Tameka holds the Mother-Daughter pageant of her dreams.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: Domani thinks he's ready for a record deal, but Tip doesn't believe in handing it to him until he earns it. Back at home, Tameka discovers Major has a paralyzing phobia of water and immediately enrolls him in swimming lessons.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: The Harris family wants to raise money for a charity close to their heart and choose to put on a carnival. While Tameka is in charge of setting up the games, Tip brings Domani to a magic shop to hone in his skills.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: It's Thanksgiving and in the spirit of giving back, the Harris family is making and handing out food to a local shelter. However, when the kids get rowdy, Tip steps in to make sure they stay on task.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: T.I. and Tiny decide to celebrate their union with a trip for two to Costa Rica. However, when the family catches wind of this planned getaway, T.I. and Tiny feel the pressure to make it a family vacation. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: Tiny's firstborn child, Niq Niq has decided she's ready to move out. Meanwhile, Messiah seeks permission from T.I. to obtain a Driver's permit, but T.I. has some of his own unorthodox tests for Messiah to pass first. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: A longtime friend of the family, Crow, seeks T.I.'s expert advice and guidance in obtaining some female companionship. Meanwhile, Tiny discovers Niq Niq hasn't been completely honest about where she is and what she's doing. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: With a thousand dollars on the line, T.I. and K-Dub test Major's knowledge against the people of Atlanta. Tiny and Niq Niq are on a health kick and a recently single Precious is determined to join them in attempts to get herself a man. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: T.I.'s friend K-Dub needs a place to stay, but after a few days, he overstays his welcome with the family. Meanwhile, King is inspired to set a world record and goes on a search to find one thing he can do that no one else can. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: T.I. is excited about his role in the new Superhero movie Ant-Man. Unfortunately, King and Major aren't. A proactive Tiny hatches a plan to nix any baby fever Niq Niq might have.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: Major wants to take acting to the next level but struggles to focus. T.I. notices his older children don't help one another, so he takes them to a place where they are locked in a room & the only one way out is to work together. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Run's House
programme.desc: Run's birthday is coming up and he's conflicted about how to celebrate.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: T.I., Tiny, and Shekinah are Chicago bound. While T.I. promotes his upcoming album, Shekinah drags Tiny all through the windy city looking for her idol, Oprah. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: When Tip finds an incriminating text on Niq Niq's phone, he sets out with Major to get to the bottom of things. Later, Tameka encourages Shekinah to join an improv group and sends the funniest person she knows to join her, King. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: Tonight has 'feud' written all over it with two of The Fabulous Lana Star’s past prodigies joining forces to teach Lana and her newest prodigy a lesson. Will the ghosts of Lana’s past haunt her in the ring forever or does she have a plan to prevail?

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)

programme.desc: With Keta Rush injured, can Stephy Slays find a new partner to help end Exile’s reign of brutality? The Psycho Sister’s leader Razor was taken out by a vicious and fiery attack last week.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: A former boyfriend of Alex is in trouble when a prison is released from jail, waiting for a new trial. The crime boss is killing the witnesses that put him in prison in the first place. Walker must save the witness so he can testify again.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: An Irish peacemaker visits Texas to talk about a plan to unify Ireland. Irish militants attempt an assassination. One of the militants is captured and the rest of the team attempt a rescue as well as continue the assassination attempts.

programme.title: Maverick
programme.desc: Bart wagers to save the lives of his fellow stagecoach travelers--who dislike gamblers--when the coach is held up and Bart makes an unusual bet with the bandits.

programme.title: Maverick
programme.desc: When a man claiming to be a leprechaun promises Bart five wishes, Bart is surprised when the first wish comes true. But the money the "leprechaun" grants turns out to be stolen.

programme.title: Maverick
programme.desc: When Bart's poker winnings include partial ownership of a casino, blackmail is part of the pot, and he starts to believe that murder may be the final payout for life as a gambler.

programme.title: Maverick
programme.desc: Bart wins a newspaper in a poker game, only to discover that the paper is being sued by a powerful senator for libel.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: General amnesty follows the shooting of young Les Tanner by hired killers. Hollister (Pat Conway) cannot arrest the gunmen because of amnesty but he prevents a new flare-up of the feud by arresting the victim's brother who is out for revenge.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Young Mark Thompson shoots an old miner in the back, robs him, and flees. Sheriff Hollister trails him to his mother's home in Paradise. In order to expose the son's true character to his faithful mother, Hollister must put his own life on the line.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Against a background of sudden death and romance, Hollister comes to grips with beautiful young widow Sarah Curtice and her band of gunmen. Clay's efforts to combat their expanding crime wave provoke a dramatic showdown with Sarah's hired guns.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: When Chris Anderson confesses to Sheriff Hollister that Brewster Flat's Sheriff Binns and his deputy were in on a robbery, Sheriff Hollister 'cuts himself in' to the deal to force a showdown among the thieves and expose a double cross.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Convicted of murder, Sam Carver (Lee Van Cleef) escapes the custody of Deputy Marshal Bledsoe thanks to some rowdy conventioneers aboard the train. Jumping off, he heads to Tombstone Territory where he takes refuge at Hendrick's ranch.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Sheriff Clay Hollister rides the stage to Laramie with a court order concerning a murder indictment against a man named Rowan. Clay finds that his fellow passengers include Rowan himself (under an alias) and a hired gun paid to kill the Sheriff.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Harvey Logan and his gunfighters take over the town of Sunglow and have themselves on a spree. Notified that the telegraph line to Sunglow is dead, Sheriff Hollister and editor Claibourne ride over to investigate and are trapped and thrown into jail.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Hollister hears a distant shot but finds nothing to explain it. When Nancy Cooley arrives in Tombstone looking for her uncle who cannot be found, the sheriff solves the riddle of his disappearance and saves Nancy from becoming a gunman's victim.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: When a British writer arrives in Tombstone to gather material for a series about the American West, he tags along with Sheriff Hollister and a prisoner as they travel to Yuma prison. But the journalist is devising a dangerous plot.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: The great fire of 1881 nearly wiped out the town. As a result, Tombstone is in danger of losing its status as County Seat to nearby Benson, leading to a feud over the matter. Hollister's guns must right a wrong when fire mysteriously strikes again.

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel
programme.desc: Carl Soddenberg committed a heinous, murderous act. Paladin is hired to get him to an asylum and keep the family's survivors at bay who are out for revenge.

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel
programme.desc: An art collector hires Paladin to guide him, and his strangely childlike daughter, to the camp of a reclusive sculptor.

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel
programme.desc: Colonel Draco invites Paladin to investigate an "insurrection" over water rights. Paladin discovers that Draco was crippled eight months previously and wants revenge.

programme.desc: As Téa's body turns more and more into a giant popsicle, can she keep her brain from freezing to find a way to melt Big 2's strategy? Or will Big 2's penguin horde waddle all over her?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey squares off against the judicial jerk Big 3 Johnson who takes the Deck Master form of Judge Man! How can Joey defeat a foe who can destroy Joey's monsters at will?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Just when Joey seems to gain the upper hand, he hits the longest streak of bad luck in the history of mankind! Has Joey's fortunes finally run out, or is a crooked judge ignoring the rules of the law?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Big 4 Nezbitt challenges Duke, Tristan, and Serenity for the right to gain control of three bodies at once! Will Serenity's errors cost her team the ultimate price when Tristan and Duke can't cover for her mistakes?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: One down, two to go! With the loss of Tristan, Serenity is heartbroken. Can she pull herself together and remember the lessons Tristan taught her to turn the duel around?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Tristan's back... but he's not who he appears to be when he kidnaps Mokuba! It's time for Kaiba to stop monkeying around and rescue his brother, but he's confronted by Big 5 Leichter!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Big 5's Satellite Cannon attacks Kaiba's monsters from deep space! Mokuba's unwavering faith in Kaiba inspires him to believe that his brother will pull out the victory, but Noah has plans to ruin their brotherhood...

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Kaiba arrives at Noah's sanctuary to rescue Mokuba, but Mokuba wants to stay with Noah! Has Mokuba seen the evil within Kaiba, or is something more sinister in the works?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Noah gives the Big Five one last chance to redeem themselves in a five-on-two tag team duel where Yugi and Joey take on the entire Big Five!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The Big Five concentrate their attack on Joey so that Yugi would be forced to duel all alone! Outmanned and overpowered, Yugi and Joey are near the end of the line!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The Big Five summon an almighty dragon that previously defeated Joey, Mai, and Mokuba! Joey and Yugi pull out all the stops, but is that enough to avoid their minds being scattered over virtual reality?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's a duel for control of KaibaCorp when Noah squares off against Kaiba! But can Kaiba fight at full strength after he learns the hidden truth about Noah... and the tragic past that made him what he is today?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Noah's Shinato's Ark steals monsters into its keep to use as an impenetrable wall of servants! How can Kaiba hurt Noah when Noah has an endless stream of monsters to protect himself with?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Kaiba's about to finish Noah, but Mokuba protects Noah from his final blow! Will Kaiba sacrifice his beloved brother in exchange for freedom, or will the brotherly bond remain unbreakable?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: For every turn that passes, one of Yugi's friends is transformed into stone! As more and more of his friends harden into solid rock, can Yugi defeat Noah before he runs out of turns and transforms into stone himself?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi's friends are petrified into solid stone statues, but their spirits live on! Their combined souls energize Yugi into a noble fight, but is spirit going to win the duel when Yugi's not drawing the right cards?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi has defeated Noah... but they still can't escape from the virtual world! The real reason behind their entrapment is revealed... as is the true villain pulling the strings!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: As Kaiba squares off against his stepfather Gozaburo for their final battle, Yugi and friends are attacked by endless hordes of monsters! Their only hope is Noah, but they can't expect help from their enemy... can they?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Time is almost up before the missile's explosion destroys Yugi and friends! Will the Battle City finalists beat the clock and live to duel another day in the stunning conclusion to the virtual world saga!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and friends arrive at KaibaCorp Island where the Battle City finalists will compete in the ultimate dueling arena! Get ready for the awesome four-person battle royal where any duelist can attack anyone else!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Honor, friendship, revenge... As each duelist remembers what they're fighting for, the battle royal rages on where none of the duelists know where the next attack is going to come from!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey may have fought some of the fiercest fights in Battle City, but has all his training taught him to become an elite duelist? Joey's gonna show what he's made of in the conclusion to the four-man battle royal!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Marik ensnares Joey in a Shadow Game where each duelist's heart is linked with his monsters... literally! Every time a monster received damage, the duelist feels the pain instead!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Marik's Helpoemer send Joey's powerful cards to the graveyard before Joey can use them! Running low on cards and life points, Joey's opportunities for staging a comeback are nearly depleted!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey thinks this duel can't turn any worse... but Marik has all the pieces necessary to summon The Winged Dragon of Ra! Can Joey prevent Marik from summoning the Egyptian God Card, or is victory simply not in the cards?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Marik transforms The Winged Dragon of Ra into its powerful form, the Egyptian God Phoenix! If Joey can't withstand the Phoenix's blazing fire, he'll lose the duel... plus his only chance to save Mai from her mental prison!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's the rematch we've all been waiting for! Yugi and Kaiba square off for the first time since Duelist Kingdom in front of thousands of ravenous fans for the right to challenge Marik! It's time to duel!
